title: Workplace Hazard Chatbot — Q1037375 Kumar Viswajeet
subtitle: Decision-support workflow for workplace hazard triage and risk review
hero_body: Capture a workplace scenario, attach an image if available, and generate structured risk guidance with privacy-aware processing and a clean handoff for human review.
form_subtitle: Enter the operational details used by the inference layer.
side_metric_text: Capture, classify, and review before action is taken.
workflow_step_1_text: Provide the workplace description and optional context image.
workflow_step_2_text: The backend forwards the request to the inference service for classification.
workflow_step_3_text: Results are returned for competent-person review. Permanent chat storage is disabled in privacy mode.
scenario_placeholder: Describe the hazard, what happened, and any immediate concerns.
scenario_hint: Include enough context for a reviewer to understand the operational risk.
location_hint: Useful for routing and incident context.
image_hint: Upload one to four clear photos if the scene benefits from visual context.
preview_panel_empty_text: Upload a photo to see a live preview here.
photo_preview_note: Preview only. The selected image is sent when you submit the form.
form_support: Responses are structured for quick operational review.
scenario_too_short_error: Please enter a workplace hazard description with at least 3 meaningful words and 15 characters.
result_subtitle: Model output and recommended next action
provider_settings_subtitle: Store OpenAI and Anthropic keys locally on this device.
provider_select_hint: Choose the provider you want to prepare for future external calls.
provider_remember_hint: Save the browser state in local storage instead of the temporary session.
provider_settings_loaded: Provider settings loaded from browser storage.
provider_settings_saved_session: Provider settings saved for this session.
provider_settings_saved_persistent: Provider settings saved on this device.
provider_settings_note: Keys stay in the browser and are never sent to the backend by this screen.
privacy_provider_note: Privacy note: use session storage for higher privacy. Browser-saved provider keys remain on this device only.
export_pdf_note: Download a professional PDF with the full input, prediction output, and audit context.
export_pdf_error: Unable to generate the PDF report.
action_low_1: Document the hazard and route it through standard safety procedures.
action_low_2: Schedule corrective action during the normal maintenance cycle.
action_low_3: Monitor until the issue is confirmed resolved.
action_medium_1: Plan corrective action within a reasonable operational window.
action_medium_2: Monitor the area until the hazard is controlled.
action_medium_3: Escalate to the responsible owner if conditions worsen.
action_high_1: Restrict access immediately and notify the responsible safety lead.
action_high_2: Arrange corrective action as a priority incident.
action_high_3: Verify the area is safe before normal operations resume.
privacy_notice_intro: No login is required. This prototype processes the current request to generate a result.
privacy_notice_item_1: No account or login is required.
privacy_notice_item_2: This chatbot is a prototype for decision support only.
privacy_notice_item_3: Chat content is processed for the current request and is not stored permanently in privacy mode.
privacy_notice_item_4: Provider keys remain in your browser only and are never sent to the backend by this screen.
privacy_notice_item_5: Image previews use temporary browser object URLs until you clear them or close the session.
privacy_notice_link: Read the full Data Privacy page
privacy_page_intro: This page explains how the prototype processes workplace scenarios, images, browser state, and server-side requests.
privacy_no_login_body: The website can be used without creating an account. No login, profile, or user identity record is required to use the chatbot.
privacy_prototype_body: This website is a dissertation prototype for decision support only. It does not replace competent-person review or formal workplace safety procedures.
privacy_browser_item_1: Provider selection and optional provider keys remain in browser storage only.
privacy_browser_item_2: If you choose session-only storage, provider keys are cleared when the browser session ends.
privacy_browser_item_3: Selected image previews use temporary browser object URLs until you clear them or close the session.
privacy_request_title: What is processed for a chat request
privacy_request_item_1: Scenario text, optional location, and optional images are sent to the application services only to generate the result.
privacy_request_item_2: The backend forwards the request to the local inference service for model prediction.
privacy_request_item_3: The returned result is shown in the UI and can be exported to PDF on demand.
privacy_storage_item_1: Privacy mode disables permanent chat-content logging in the backend by default.
privacy_storage_item_2: Chat requests are processed in memory for the current request-response cycle.
privacy_storage_item_3: Standard operational logs may still record technical status information, but not the full chat content in privacy mode.
privacy_storage_item_4: If the live system configuration changes, this page must be updated to match the real behavior.
privacy_pdf_item_1: A PDF is generated only when you request an export.
privacy_pdf_item_2: The PDF response is streamed back to the browser and is not retained by default in privacy mode.
privacy_provider_item_1: Provider keys entered in this screen remain in the browser and are not sent to the backend by the current UI flow.
privacy_provider_item_2: For higher privacy, use session storage instead of persistent browser storage.
privacy_guidance_item_1: Do not enter personal data unless it is operationally necessary and permitted for your use case.
privacy_guidance_item_2: Review the result with a competent person before taking workplace safety decisions.
safety_note: This AI output is intended for decision support only and should be reviewed by a competent person before workplace safety decisions are made.
